gist.headline: Dreaming on canvas
gist.blurb: DreamCanvas AI just sprouted in the greenhouse! A fresh web interface for generating images with the Pollinations API.
gist.summary: Added DreamCanvas AI, a new web-based interface for generating images using the Pollinations API, to the community apps showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and use DreamCanvas AI directly from our community apps directory.
gist.visual_concept: DreamCanvas AI implies art, painting, and imagination. Polly the bee as an artist (wearing a beret) painting on a digital canvas, accompanied by the Monitor Robot acting as an art assistant.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, painting on a glowing digital canvas. A chunky pixel robot with a CRT monitor head stands nearby holding a paint palette, screen glowing lime green (#ecf874). Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites, nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
